description: CI-safe runner task template for collecting OpenClaw latency/runtime diagnostics on target nodes (nosuk/vps2). Produces structured latency check evidence and markdown runbook without restarting gateways, deploying, or touching live production services.

template.label: OpenClaw all-node latency check
commands: echo '--- Step 1: OpenClaw version and runtime ---'
openclaw --version 2>&1 | tee /work/artifacts/${EVIDENCE_PREFIX}-version.txt || echo 'openclaw not in PATH'
openclaw gateway probe 2>&1 | tee /work/artifacts/${EVIDENCE_PREFIX}-gateway-probe.txt || echo 'gateway probe failed (expected in sandbox)'
openclaw logs 10 2>&1 | tee /work/artifacts/${EVIDENCE_PREFIX}-logs.txt || echo 'no logs available'
echo '--- Step 7: Plugin and provider discovery ---'
openclaw status --deep 2>&1 | grep -iE 'provider|plugin|channel' | head -20 | tee /work/artifacts/${EVIDENCE_PREFIX}-providers.txt || echo 'no provider info'
cat /var/lib/openclaw-a2a/tasks/*/task.json 2>/dev/null | head -50 | tee /work/artifacts/${EVIDENCE_PREFIX}-backlog.txt || echo 'no A2A backlog'
echo '--- Step 9: Build latency check evidence JSON ---'

node -e "const {collectOpenClawLatencyCheck, formatLatencyCheckRunbook} = require('./src/openclaw-latency-check.js'); const check = collectOpenClawLatencyCheck('${TARGET_NODE}'); const fs = require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('/work/artifacts/${EVIDENCE_PREFIX}-evidence.json', JSON.stringify(check, null, 2) + '\n'); fs.writeFileSync('/work/artifacts/${EVIDENCE_PREFIX}-runbook.md', formatLatencyCheckRunbook(check) + '\n'); console.log('Latency check evidence written');" 2>&1 || echo 'latency check module not built yet - using CLI-only evidence'
template.prompt: Collect OpenClaw latency and runtime diagnostics on target node ${TARGET_NODE}. Run the latency check template commands, collect structured evidence, and report findings. Do not restart Gateway/broker/worker, deploy, send provider messages, ACK terminal evidence, or mutate production state.
